title: Uniface 10: Changes per Release
text: Uniface 10: Changes per Release Uniface provides regular patches, services packs, and minor releases for its flagship Uniface product. Changes made from one release to another are described in the following related topics. Related Links What's New in Uniface 10.4.02 Rocket® Uniface 10.4.02 introduces the ability to throw and catch exceptions to handle ProcScript and user-defined errors. It also opens up the USYSHTTP component so that you can customize its behavior when processing web requests from the Web Request Dispatcher (WRD). What's New in Uniface 10.4.01 Rocket® Uniface 10.4 features a new licensing management system and Repository changes to enable future Uniface IDE enhancements. In addition there are improvements to enable the Uniface Router Monitor to handle TLS connections, and some significant currency upgrades. What's New in Uniface 10.3.02 Main features added in Uniface 10.3.2 What's New in Uniface 10.3.01 Uniface 10.3.01 provides significant enhancements to the Uniface IDE, application security, and the Uniface Repository.
